verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Whatever is in the heavens and the earth glorifies God. He is the Mighty, the Wise.

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: To Him (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. He gives life and causes death. He is powerful over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْءَاخِرُ وَٱلظَّٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: He is the First and the Last, the Outer and the Inner. He has knowledge of everything.

verses.quran_arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍۢ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا وَمَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا ۖ وَهُوَ مَعَكُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌۭ
verses.text: He (it is) who created the heavens and the earth in six days. Then He mounted the throne. He knows what penetrates into the earth, and what comes forth from it, and what comes down from the sky, and what goes up into it. He is with you wherever you are. God sees what you do.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ
verses.text: To Him (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and to God (all) matters are returned.

verses.quran_arabic: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيْلَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِى ٱلَّيْلِ ۚ وَهُوَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: He causes the night to pass into the day, and causes the day to pass into the night. He knows what is in the hearts.

verses.quran_arabic: ءَامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسْتَخْلَفِينَ فِيهِ ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌۭ كَبِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Believe in God and His messenger, and contribute from what He has made you inheritors in. Those of you who believe and contribute – for them (there will be) a great reward.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا لَكُمْ لَا تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِرَبِّكُمْ وَقَدْ أَخَذَ مِيثَٰقَكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: What is (the matter) with you that you do not believe in God, when the messenger calls you to believe in your Lord, and He has already taken a covenant with you, if you are believers?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُؤۡمِنُونَ بِاللَّهِ وَاَلرَّسُولُ يَدۡعُوكُمۡ لِتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ أُخِذَ مِيثَٰقُكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And what is the matter with youpl that you do not believe in Allah when the Messenger calls you to believe in your Lord—when your pledge has been taken— if you are believers?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُومِنُونَ بِاللَّهِ وَاَلرَّسُولُ يَدۡعُوكُمۡ لِتُومِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ  أُخِذَ مِيثَٰقُكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّومِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And what is the matter with youpl that you do not believe in Allah when the Messenger calls you to believe in your Lord—when your pledge has been taken— if you are believers?

verses.quran_arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦٓ ءَايَٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ لِّيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: He (it is) who sends down on His servant clear signs, so that He may bring you forth from the darkness to the light. Surely God is indeed kind (and) compassionate with you.

canonical_variants.arabic: هُوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦٓ ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ بِكُمۡ لَرَؤُفٞ رَّحِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.

canonical_variants.arabic: هُوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ  ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ بِكُمۡ  لَرَؤُفٞ رَّحِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.

canonical_variants.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمُۥ لَرَءُوفٞ رَّحِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.

canonical_variants.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمُۥ لَرَءُوفٞ رَّحِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا لَكُمْ أَلَّا تُنفِقُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِلَّهِ مِيرَٰثُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ لَا يَسْتَوِى مِنكُم مَّنْ أَنفَقَ مِن قَبْلِ ٱلْفَتْحِ وَقَٰتَلَ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَعْظَمُ دَرَجَةًۭ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنفَقُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدُ وَقَٰتَلُوا۟ ۚ وَكُلًّۭا وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌۭ
verses.text: What is (the matter) with you that you do not contribute in the way of God, when the inheritance of the heavens and the earth (belongs) to God? The one among you who contributed and fought before the victory is not equal. They are higher in rank than those who contributed and fought after that. Yet to each God has promised the good (reward). God is aware of what you do.

verses.quran_arabic: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يُقْرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًۭا فَيُضَٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌۭ كَرِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Who is the one who will lend to God a good loan, and He will double it for him? For him (there will be) a generous reward.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ تَرَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ يَسْعَىٰ نُورُهُم بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَٰنِهِم بُشْرَىٰكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ جَنَّٰتٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: On the Day when you see the believing men and the believing women: their light will run before them, and at their right (hands): ‘Good news for you today! Gardens through which rivers flow, there to remain. That is the great triumph!’

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ ٱلْمُنَٰفِقُونَ وَٱلْمُنَٰفِقَٰتُ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱنظُرُونَا نَقْتَبِسْ مِن نُّورِكُمْ قِيلَ ٱرْجِعُوا۟ وَرَآءَكُمْ فَٱلْتَمِسُوا۟ نُورًۭا فَضُرِبَ بَيْنَهُم بِسُورٍۢ لَّهُۥ بَابٌۢ بَاطِنُهُۥ فِيهِ ٱلرَّحْمَةُ وَظَٰهِرُهُۥ مِن قِبَلِهِ ٱلْعَذَابُ
verses.text: On the Day when the hypocrite men and the hypocrite women will say to those who believed: ‘Wait for us! Let us borrow your light!’ It will be said, ‘Turn back and search for a light!’ And a wall with a door will be set up between them: on the inside of it (there is) mercy, and on the outside of it – facing (it) – (there is) the punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: يُنَادُونَهُمْ أَلَمْ نَكُن مَّعَكُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنَّكُمْ فَتَنتُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَتَرَبَّصْتُمْ وَٱرْتَبْتُمْ وَغَرَّتْكُمُ ٱلْأَمَانِىُّ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَغَرَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْغَرُورُ
verses.text: They will call out to them: ‘Were we not with you?’ They will say, ‘Yes, indeed! But you tempted yourselves, and you waited and doubted, and wishful thinking deceived you, until the command of God came, and the Deceiver deceived you about God.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنكُمْ فِدْيَةٌۭ وَلَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ مَأْوَىٰكُمُ ٱلنَّارُ ۖ هِىَ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: So today no ransom will be accepted from you, nor from those who have disbelieved. Your refuge is the Fire – it is your protector – and it is an evil destination!’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَن تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبْلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْأَمَدُ فَقَسَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Is it not time for those who believe that their hearts become humble before the Reminder of God, and (before) what has come down of the truth, and (that) they not be like those to whom the Book was given before, and for whom the time lasted too long, so that their hearts became hard, and many of them were wicked?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ اَ۬لۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَاَلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمِ اِ۬لۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَانِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ  قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ اَ۬لۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَاَلَّذِينَ  أُوتُواْ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمِ اِ۬لۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ  مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which came down of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمُۥ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمُۥۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمُۥ فَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمُۥ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمُۥۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمُۥ فَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

verses.quran_arabic: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Know that God gives the earth life after its death. We have made clear to you the signs, so that you may understand.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلْمُصَّدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقْرَضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًۭا يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمْ وَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌۭ كَرِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely the charitable men and the charitable women, and (those who) have lent to God a good loan – it will be doubled for them, and for them (there will be) a generous reward.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمۡ وَلَهُمۡ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, men who believe and women who believe, who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَّدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمۡ وَلَهُمۡ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, charitable men and charitable women who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا يُضَعَّفُ لَهُمُۥ وَلَهُمُۥ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, men who believe and women who believe, who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا يُضَعَّفُ لَهُمُۥ وَلَهُمُۥ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, men who believe and women who believe, who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦٓ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ ۖ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءُ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ أَجْرُهُمْ وَنُورُهُمْ ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: Those who believe in God and His messengers, those – they are the truthful and the martyrs in the sight of their Lord – they have their reward and their light. But those who disbelieve and call Our signs a lie – those are the companions of the Furnace.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا لَعِبٌۭ وَلَهْوٌۭ وَزِينَةٌۭ وَتَفَاخُرٌۢ بَيْنَكُمْ وَتَكَاثُرٌۭ فِى ٱلْأَمْوَٰلِ وَٱلْأَوْلَٰدِ ۖ كَمَثَلِ غَيْثٍ أَعْجَبَ ٱلْكُفَّارَ نَبَاتُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصْفَرًّۭا ثُمَّ يَكُونُ حُطَٰمًۭا ۖ وَفِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ عَذَابٌۭ شَدِيدٌۭ وَمَغْفِرَةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنٌۭ ۚ وَمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَآ إِلَّا مَتَٰعُ ٱلْغُرُورِ
verses.text: Know that this present life is nothing but jest and diversion, and a (passing) splendor, and a (cause for) boasting among you, and a rivalry in wealth and children. (It is) like rain: the vegetation it produces pleases the disbelievers, (but) then it withers and you see it turning yellow, (and) then it becomes broken debris. In the Hereafter (there is) a harsh punishment,

verses.quran_arabic: سَابِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا كَعَرْضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أُعِدَّتْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text:
and forgiveness from God and approval. But this present life is nothing but the enjoyment of deception.

Race toward forgiveness from your Lord, and a Garden – its width is like the width of the sky and the earth – prepared for those who believe in God and His messengers. That is the favor of God. He gives it to whomever He pleases. God is full of great favor.

verses.quran_arabic: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍۢ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ إِلَّا فِى كِتَٰبٍۢ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن نَّبْرَأَهَآ ۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌۭ
verses.text: No smiting smites in the earth or among yourselves, except that it was in a Book before We brought it about – surely that is easy for God –

verses.quran_arabic: لِّكَيْلَا تَأْسَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا تَفْرَحُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍۢ فَخُورٍ
verses.text: so that you may not grieve over what eludes you, nor gloat about what has come to you. God does not love anyone who is arrogant (and) boastful,

canonical_variants.arabic: لِّكَيۡلَا تَأۡسَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَفۡرَحُواْ بِمَآ أَتَىٰكُمۡۗ وَاَللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالٖ فَخُورٍ
canonical_variants.english: so that youpl do not grieve over what you have missed nor exult over what has come to you. And Allah does not love every self-admiring boaster—

canonical_variants.arabic: لِّكَيۡلَا  تَاسَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَفۡرَحُواْ بِمَا أَتَىٰكُمۡۗ وَاَللَّهُ  لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالٖ فَخُورٍ
canonical_variants.english: so that youpl do not grieve over what you have missed nor exult over what has come to you. And Allah does not love every self-admiring boaster—

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبُخْلِ ۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.text: (nor) those who are stingy and command the people to be stingy. Whoever turns away – surely God – He is the wealthy One, the Praiseworthy.

canonical_variants.arabic: اِ۬لذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسَ بِالْبُخْلِۖ وَمَنْ يَّتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ اَ۬لْغَنِيُّ اُ۬لْحَمِيدُۖ
canonical_variants.english: those who are miserly and command mankind to miserliness. And whoever turns away—indeed, Allah is the Self-Sufficient, the Praiseworthy.

canonical_variants.arabic: اِ۬لذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَامُرُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسَ بِالْبُخْلِۖ وَمَنْ يَّتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ اَ۬لْغَنِيُّ اُ۬لْحَمِيدُۖ
canonical_variants.english: those who are miserly and command mankind to miserliness. And whoever turns away—indeed, Allah is the Self-Sufficient, the Praiseworthy.

verses.quran_arabic: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ وَأَنزَلْنَا مَعَهُمُ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ لِيَقُومَ ٱلنَّاسُ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَأَنزَلْنَا ٱلْحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأْسٌۭ شَدِيدٌۭ وَمَنَٰفِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥ وَرُسُلَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌۭ
verses.text: Certainly We sent Our messengers with the clear signs, and We sent down with them the Book and the scale, so that the people might uphold justice. And We sent down iron – in which (there is) harsh violence, but (also) benefits for the people – and (We did so) in order that God might know who would help Him and His messengers in the unseen. Surely God is strong, mighty.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًۭا وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلْكِتَٰبَ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مُّهْتَدٍۢ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We sent Noah and Abraham, and We placed among his descendants the prophetic office and the Book. Yet (there was only the occasional) one of them who was (rightly) guided, but many of them were wicked.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ قَفَّيْنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيْنَا بِعِيسَى ٱبْنِ مَرْيَمَ وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُ ٱلْإِنجِيلَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ رَأْفَةًۭ وَرَحْمَةًۭ وَرَهْبَانِيَّةً ٱبْتَدَعُوهَا مَا كَتَبْنَٰهَا عَلَيْهِمْ إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ رِضْوَٰنِ ٱللَّهِ فَمَا رَعَوْهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَا ۖ فَـَٔاتَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ أَجْرَهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Then in their footsteps We followed up with Our messengers, and We followed up with Jesus, son of Mary, and gave him the Gospel, and placed in the hearts of those who followed him kindness and mercy. But monasticism, they originated it. We did not prescribe it for them. (It) only (arose out of their) seeking the approval of God. Yet they did not observe it as it should have been observed. So We gave those of them who believed their reward, but many of them were wicked.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤْتِكُمْ كِفْلَيْنِ مِن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ نُورًۭا تَمْشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: You who believe! Guard (yourselves) against God and believe in His messenger! He will give you a double portion of His mercy, and will make a light for you by means of which you will walk, and He will forgive you – God is forgiving, compassionate –

verses.quran_arabic: لِّئَلَّا يَعْلَمَ أَهْلُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ أَلَّا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ مِّن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَأَنَّ ٱلْفَضْلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: so that the People of the Book may know that they have no power over any of the favor of God, and that favor is in the hand of God. He gives it to whomever He pleases. God is full of great favor.
